description: You are the IT Service Desk Manager at a 500-person company. Currently all tickets route to a single person, creating a bottleneck. Your director has approved hiring two specialists and restructuring the team. Create two new Technician Groups named 'Network Operations Team' and 'Hardware Support Team'. Add a new technician named 'Maya Patel' (login: mpatel, email: mpatel@company.local) to the 'Network Operations Team' and a new technician named 'Carlos Rivera' (login: crivera, email: crivera@company.local) to the 'Hardware Support Team'. Assign the open VPN connectivity request regarding 30-minute drops to the 'Network Operations Team' and the open laptop keyboard request to the 'Hardware Support Team'. Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.
